tool_args.label: Subway Customer Journey Time Performance October 2023
Bus Customer Journey Time Performance October 2023

payload.raw_value_text: approximately 1.4 million average daily customers (62% of pre-pandemic ridership)
58% of customers felt safe on trains
56 speed increases implemented in 2023 to date

payload.description: ABLE deploys automated cameras on buses which ticket vehicles illegally operating in bus lanes. Active on 623 buses, covering 80 miles of bus lanes, on 21 routes, benefiting 450,000 daily customers. 328,000 violations issued in four years, 8% recidivism rate. Increases bus speeds by additional 5% on top of bus lanes/busways, 20% reduction in collisions.

Rebranding of ABLE program to ACE starting May 2024. Expanded enforcement powers to include bus stops and double-parking. Coverage expanded to as many as 2,500 road miles. By 2028, will benefit nearly one million daily customers. Initially expanded to 400 buses on 14 new routes in 2024, with 1,000 buses by 2027 on 65 total routes.
ABLE program expanded to the Q54 route, improving the commute of 12,000 customers along the Jamaica Avenue Busway

payload.claim_text: In October, customer satisfaction with wait times was 46%, the lowest rated metric for bus customers. 28% of bus customers said improving wait times is the single biggest factor in increasing their satisfaction.

payload.description: 3.1 miles of bus lanes on Gun Hill Road, completed on October 31, 2023, improving the commute of 40,000 daily customers who ride the Bx28, Bx38, Bx41, and Bx41-SBS

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

payload.claim_text: NYCT is focusing on the 'Faster' aspect of the 'Faster, Cleaner, Safer' Plan. From increased frequency on eight subway lines, historic highs in subway on-time performance, ambitious plans to speed up buses citywide, and new efforts to speed up the paratransit booking process.
New York City Transit is guided by the feedback of our customers as we continue to progress towards our North Star goal of 70% satisfaction on all modes.
